brief.objective: explain CARE Coaching and drive inquiry
keyMessages: CARE Coaching provides customized learning opportunities for administrators, teachers, school leaders, and district leaders.
CARE Coaching can support multilingual learner success alongside family engagement and standards-aligned teaching, learning, and assessment.
CARE Coaching supports educators through Consulting, Coaching, and Continuous Learning.
proofPoints: The CARE Coaching page identifies the Three Cs as Consulting, Coaching, and Continuous Learning.
The Pathways products page describes CARE Coaching as collaborative educator support with reflective and data-driven practices.
visualDirection: coach and school leader reviewing notes
brief.layoutRecommendation: Use a one-page flyer with a strong headline, short audience framing, three concise support blocks, a source-grounded proof point, and one clear CTA.

headlineOptions: Every Voice, Every Classroom, Every Learner
Consulting, coaching, and continuous learning for your team
subheadOptions: CARE Coaching provides tailored professional development, workshops, program evaluations, and personalized coaching that help educators reflect on current practice.
CARE Coaching provides customized learning opportunities for administrators, teachers, school leaders, and district leaders.
CARE Coaching provides customized learning opportunities for administrators, teachers, school leaders, and district leaders.
copy.body: CARE Coaching provides customized learning opportunities for administrators, teachers, school leaders, and district leaders. For district EL leaders, this draft focuses on customized coaching and professional learning for multilingual learner support.
bullets: CARE Coaching provides customized learning opportunities for administrators, teachers, school leaders, and district leaders.
CARE Coaching can support multilingual learner success alongside family engagement and standards-aligned teaching, learning, and assessment.
CARE Coaching supports educators through Consulting, Coaching, and Continuous Learning.
The CARE Coaching page identifies the Three Cs as Consulting, Coaching, and Continuous Learning.
copy.footer: Draft generated for internal review. Claims should remain tied to the source evidence shown with this artifact.

fittedCopy.headline: Every Voice, Every Classroom, Every Learner
fittedCopy.deck: CARE Coaching supports district EL leaders through Consulting, Coaching, and Continuous Learning.
proofPoints: Support multilingual learner success alongside family engagement and standards-aligned teaching, learning, and assessment.
Customized learning opportunities for administrators, teachers, school leaders, and district leaders.
fittedCopy.footer: Draft generated for internal review. Claims should remain tied to the source evidence shown with this artifact.

compositionTemplate.typographyScale: large campaign headline with compact support proof
compositionTemplate.artPlateTreatment: full-bleed branded atmosphere cropped into the composition
compositionTemplate.copyPlacement: left-led editorial stack with proof band integrated below

designRecipe.hierarchy: campaign flyer hierarchy with a bold inclusive headline, concise supporting deck, two proof points, and a compact CTA anchored in the lower rhythm
designRecipe.artDirection: warm, credible district-facing flyer concept for CARE Coaching that pairs a calm editorial message column with a full-bleed right-side scene of multilingual learning leadership in action—educators in conversation, classroom observation, family-connected school culture, and evidence of coaching support—using optimistic light, human presence, and a polished nonprofit-education aesthetic
designRecipe.placeholderStrategy: reserve the left copy column through composition, negative space, contrast falloff, and subject eyelines; imply lower support for proof and CTA through tonal structure only, never with boxes or faux interface elements
designRecipe.appComposition: 4:5 portrait flyer with official logo and all live copy owned by the app in a left-led editorial stack; ImageGen composes the entire artifact concept so the right-field imagery, edge crops, lighting, and lower visual rhythm naturally support the proof band and CTA placement
promptDirectives: design the complete flyer concept with a clear left text zone and integrated right-field visual story
show authentic district EL leadership and multilingual learner support through human-centered school scenes, not generic corporate imagery
use branded warmth, editorial polish, and full-bleed atmosphere to create trust and momentum
preserve clean negative space for app-owned headline, proof, logo, and CTA without drawing placeholders or fake text

compositionScore.question: Would I send this to the WCEPS team without apology?
warnings: CARE Coaching prompt is missing avoid guardrail(s): lecture hall, random books, fake chevron.

layoutQa.question: Would I send this layout to the WCEPS team without apology?

copyQualityQa.question: Would I send this copy to the WCEPS team without apology?

visualQa.question: Would I send this visual system to the WCEPS team without apology?

renderQa.question: Would I send this rendered artifact to the WCEPS team without apology?

modelQa.question: Would a senior WCEPS reviewer send this artifact without apology?
warnings: Primary messaging is broadly inclusive and professional but not distinctively anchored to CARE Coaching's specific offer for district EL leaders.
Repeated phrasing around 'customized learning opportunities' weakens polish and makes the flyer feel scaffolded.
Art plate shows a credible educator collaboration scene, but the props and context are generic and only loosely signal multilingual learner support or EL leadership.
CTA is understandable but underpowered for production because it provides no concrete response path or supporting action detail.
Copy QA passed at 100 even though brand-preferred terms were missing and the copy contains repetition and limited audience specificity.

imageResults.revisedPrompt: Portrait full-page campaign art plate for CARE Coaching aimed at district EL leaders. Create a polished editorial-split composition: left side reserved as a clean, type-safe negative-space column for app-owned headline and proof copy; right side a full-bleed warm, credible education-sector scene showing two or three educators in authentic collaborative coaching conversation, reviewing multilingual learner support materials and coaching notes in a bright professional learning setting. Visual tone: warm, practical, district-facing, collaborative, polished, premium NYC media/ad-agency quality. Use branded palette influences of teal, aqua, green, and soft gold in atmosphere and accents, but do not render any readable text, letters, numbers, logos, badges, seals, arrows, chevrons, mountain shapes, cards, panels, charts, or fake UI. No close-up faces, no detailed hands, no stock workshop posing. Show authentic educator reflection and planning, with visual cues for customized coaching, continuous learning, multilingual support, and the Three Cs implied only through subject matter and composition, not words. Preserve strong contrast and calm negative space on the left through subject placement, eyelines, light falloff, and layered depth. Keep energy away from trim edges, with a designed full-bleed atmosphere and intentional crop-safe composition. The result should feel like a complete marketing flyer concept that the app can finish with its own logo, headline, CTA, and copy.

request.goal: explain CARE Coaching and drive inquiry
request.topic: customized coaching and professional learning for multilingual learner support
request.notes: Highlight the Three Cs without drifting into sibling needs-assessment copy.

sourceEvidence.excerpt: The WCEPS CARE Coaching program supports educators by focusing on the Three Cs: Consulting, Coaching, and Continuous Learning.
sourceEvidence.label: CARE Coaching Three Cs

sourceEvidence.excerpt: Our professional learning offerings are designed to help educators reflect on their current practices and implement research-based actions that lead to meaningful change.
sourceEvidence.label: CARE Coaching support model

sourceEvidence.excerpt: CARE Coaching is described through collaborative educator support, reflective and data-driven practices, and student-centered growth.
sourceEvidence.label: Products page CARE overview
